title: Coup on Thyferra
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Battle of Thyferra}} {{Battle |prev=[[Battle of Nickel One]] |conc= |next=[[Battle of Sarm]] |image= |name=Coup on Thyferra |conflict=[[Swarm War]] |date=[[36 ABY]] |place=[[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]] |result=[[Killik/Legends|Killik]] victory |side1=[[New Jedi Order]] |side2=Killik and [[Vratix/Legends|Vratix]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] |commanders2= |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=[[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] |forces2=*Killik swarms *Thyferran military |forces3= |forces4= |casual1= |casual2= |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|Regretfully, our garrison intercepted his team before they could prevent the Killiks from landing on Thyferra."''
''"You don't mean to say—''"
''"I'm afraid I do. The Killiks have taken control of our bacta supply.|Gilad Pellaeon and Jacen Solo|''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]''}} The '''coup on Thyferra''' occurred in [[36 ABY]] during the [[Swarm War]], when a group of [[Killik/Legends|Killiks]] and [[Membrosia/Legends|black membrosia]]-addicted [[Vratix/Legends|Vratix]] took control of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]], seizing control of the [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] supply of [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] along with it. [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] was dispatched with a team of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] to prevent the coup, but they were held up by [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon's]] forces in a misunderstanding, and thus were unable to stop the Killiks from seizing control. ==Appearances== *''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]'' {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{SwarmWarNav}} {{Interlang |de=Schlacht von Thyferra (36 NSY) |es=Golpe de Estado en Thyferra }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Thyferra, coup on}} [[Category:Battles of the Swarm War]] [[Category:Battles of Thyferra]]
